reforms.description: The Luxembourg government has redefined funding schemes to align with EU rules, focusing on regional development, small and medium-sized enterprises, research and development, and environmental protection.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By targeting funding towards R&D and SMEs, the reform is expected to enhance innovation capacity and economic diversification.
reforms.status_evidence: Funding schemes have been redefined in accordance with EU rules.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in funding priorities, aligning them with EU standards and enhancing support for innovation and regional development.
reforms.source_quote: Funding schemes have been redefined in accordance with EU rules, i.e. have been focused on regional development, small and medium-size enterprises, research and development and environment protection.
